reasoning: Spain and France sit as clear co-favorites, with markets pricing Spain marginally ahead — Kalshi has Spain at 16.5% and France at 16.3%, and Spain enters on a 31-game unbeaten streak that underlines La Roja's depth and cohesion. France match that quality with Mbappé leading an elite spine, though both face injury caveats, and both still have group games to navigate before knockouts. England are the next tier but opened with a tough Croatia test in Group L, while Brazil's case is dented by losing Estêvão and Rodrygo to injury, thinning their attacking depth. Morocco is the standout live outsider given their 2022 semifinal core and Regragui's tactical discipline, making them dangerous against bigger names despite a difficult Group C with Brazil and Scotland.
